subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Through the resplendent traces of divine favors thou hast become the recipient of services to the Cause of God, and when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق از آثار باهره الطاف غیبی آنگه مورد خدمات امرالله گشتی و چون
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @thankfulness; gratitude, @power of prayer
